pred_reason: The contract uses Solidity 0.4.21 which lacks built-in overflow protection, and multiple arithmetic operations in transfer/transferFrom functions were identified as vulnerable. These findings directly align with SWC-101 which covers integer overflow and underflow vulnerabilities. Evidence: Solidity version 0.4.21 used without SafeMath protections; Arithmetic operations (+=, -=) in transfer functions vulnerable to overflow; Total supply assignment and balance calculations at risk of exceeding uint256 limits
